title: Austin Sidequests List — running registry of weird/cool ATX spots
html:
TL;DR

  • A standalone running registry of ~50 Austin spots Yahir wants to hit — antique stores, ice cream, hill-country overlooks, abandoned water parks, a 24/7 porn-booth arcade, a pro-wrestling academy.
  • This is the seed doc for the much larger sidequest section in the Emily visit itinerary 9 days later — same list, mostly verbatim, expanded into trip-planning context.
  • Spans every register: Hyde Park indie bookstores → Hill Country natural-area drives → kink-curious novelty venues → late-night ramen → frozen-margarita Tex-Mex.
  • Geographic spine: Hyde Park cluster (Elizabeth Ney Museum, We Live Video, First Light Books, Out of the Past) + Hill Country day-trip cluster (Enchanted Rock, Hamilton Pool, Krause Springs, Mount Bonnell) + a South Austin recycle/reuse thread (Use2, Practice Yoga Austin).
  • Functional value: this is a map of Yahir's curiosity in Austin — what would catch his eye if he weren't on a Rankett treadmill.

Notable entries (worth surfacing)

  • Aqua Thrill Way — abandoned water park.
  • Tracker Lounge ATX — space-bus-themed bar.
  • Burnett Northwest Center — "Sidequest Mall" (likely Burnet Rd; Austin slang for the corridor).
  • Casa De Luz — "no menu, no seasoning, 3rd Space".
  • Callahans — tractor-supply OG-type spot.
  • Stargazer — coffee in morning, cocktail at night.
  • Curra Hyde Park — frozen margaritas.
  • Granny Tacos — breakfast tacos.
  • Mama Betty's — Tex-Mex.
  • Ramen Del Barrio.
  • Hokey Moley + Milonga House + Dylan Wylde (South Lamar) — late-night.

Hill Country / outdoor: Barton Hills, Greenbelt Bluff (right entrance), Top of DT Parking Garage (overlook), Mount Bonnell, Jessica Hollis Park, Hippie Hollow, Krause Springs, "Hill of Life / Dam of Life" (steep Greenbelt feature), Aquadome, Enchanted Rock.

Why this matters in the graph

The sidequest list is a quiet counter-narrative to the founder loneliness thread — it's a list of places Yahir wants to be in his body in, not a to-do for the laptop. When the Emily arc gets the March 13–25 visit, this list becomes the menu. When the relationship fades by April 4, the list also becomes a "why am I here" counterpoint — Austin offered all this and Yahir didn't get to most of it.

Privacy notes

  • "Austin 6 — 24/7 Porn booths" preserved verbatim from raw; not a privacy issue, just unusual-for-the-graph.
  • No personal-info leaks in this doc.

Connections
